# T001 · Establish copilot log branch

date: 2026-03-25  
task: Set up permanent logging structure on `copilot` branch  

## goal

Replace ad-hoc context loss between agent sessions with a lightweight, always-findable log. One branch, one folder, commits as the log.

## scope

- Created orphan branch `copilot` (no shared history with main)
- Created `.github/copilot/status.md` — overwritten each session with current state
- Created `.github/copilot/log/` — append-only; one file per task, never edited

## outcome

done — structure in place, branch pushed

## working branch

copilot/t-copilot-structure-002-propose-repo-structure

## pr

none for this log entry (the log branch itself is the deliverable)

## merged

n/a

## notes

- Proposed repo structure (handlers, schema, src, contracts, examples) discussed in session T002 on the working branch above
- project-init.md on the working branch is Gustaf's source of truth for pending work
- Agents starting a new task: read status.md first, then relevant log entries if context on a specific area is needed
